# Wander Wheels — Bike & Scooter Rental in Varkala, Kerala

> Wander Wheels is Varkala's most trusted two-wheeler rental service. We offer affordable, well-maintained scooters and bikes (Honda Activa, Honda Dio, Yamaha Ray) starting from ₹600/day. Based in Varkala, Kerala, India. We serve tourists, backpackers, and locals exploring Varkala's cliffs, beaches, and backwaters.

- Business type: Bike rental / Scooter rental / Two-wheeler rental
- Location: VMC.15/322/3 Vattaplamoodu, Sreenivasapuram PO, Varkala, Kerala, India
- Phone: +91 8129522024
- Email: wanderwheelsvarkala@gmail.com
- WhatsApp booking: https://wa.me/918129522024
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wander_wheels_varkala/
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/4peNMMEKeEmRXink8

## Pages

- [Home](https://wanderwheelsrentals.in/): Main landing page. Covers fleet overview (Honda Activa, Honda Dio, Yamaha Ray), pricing starting ₹600/day, booking via WhatsApp, customer reviews (4.9/5 on Google Maps), FAQ, and contact details.
- [Places to Visit in Varkala](https://wanderwheelsrentals.in/places-to-visit-in-varkala): An interactive travel guide mapping top attractions like Varkala Cliff, Kappil Beach, Jatayu Earth Center, Mangrove adventures, and local toddy shops.
- [Price Calculator](https://wanderwheelsrentals.in/price-calculator): Instant online price estimation for long and short-term scooter rentals based on user dates and durations.
- [Blog](https://wanderwheelsrentals.in/blogs): Travel guides and tips for exploring Varkala and Kerala by two-wheeler.
- [Bangalore to Varkala Weekend Escape Guide (2026)](https://wanderwheelsrentals.in/bangalore-to-varkala-weekend-escape-guide): Detailed travel guide covering train/bus routes, best time to visit, 3-day itinerary, and how to rent a bike on arrival in Varkala.

## Key Facts

- Rental prices start at ₹600/day
- Fleet: Honda Activa, Honda Dio, Yamaha Ray
- Two free helmets included with every rental
- Paperless booking — upload ID digitally, pay via UPI or card
- 24/7 roadside assistance across Varkala
- Delivery available to Varkala Railway Station and nearby areas
- Serves both Indian and international tourists (IDP accepted)
- Google Maps rating: 4.9/5
- No hidden charges; fully refundable security deposit
- Government approved
- Technology enabled
- affordable and reliable

## Service Area

Varkala and surrounding areas including Edava, Kappil, Vettakkada, railway station, cliff and nearby coastal towns in Kerala, India.
